igbo.vision_audit_failed_the_file_may_be_to: Vision audit dara. Faịlụ nwere ike ibu ibu nke ukwuu ma ọ bụ na-akwadoghị ya.
igbo.audit_failed_try_different_content_or_: Audit dara. Nwaa ọdịnaya dị iche ma ọ bụ URL dị mfe.
igbo.audit_failed_the_content_could_not_be_: Audit dara. Enweghị ike nyochaa ọdịnaya ahụ.
igbo.be_an_accessibility_change_agent_audit: Bụrụ onye nnọchiteanya mgbanwe maka accessibility — nyochaa, mụta, kwado
igbo.blind_low_vision: Ndị kpuru ìsì na ndị anya na-adịghị ahụ nke ọma
igbo.need_screen_readers_and_alt_text: Chọrọ screen reader na alt text
igbo.deaf_hard_of_hearing: Ndị ntị chiri na ndị na-anụ ihe ike
igbo.need_clear_language_and_structure: Chọrọ asụsụ na nhazi doro anya
igbo.audit_paste_it_see_what_breaks: Audit — mado ya, hụ ihe na-agbaji
igbo.ai_runs_a_wcag_2_1_aa_pass_against_url: AI na-eme WCAG 2.1 AA pass na ntinye URL / HTML / PDF / screenshot / social / gọọmentị. Ihe a na-ahụkarị: alt text na-efu (1.1.1), color contrast n'okpuru 4.5:1 (1.4.3), keyboard traps (2.1.1), ubi na-enweghị label (3.3.2).
igbo.perceivable_operable_understandable_ro: Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust (POUR). Njirimara WCAG ọ bụla dakọtara na otu n'ime ndị a. Nkwarụ bụ enweghị ndakọrịta n'etiti ahụ na gburugburu, ọ dịghị mgbe ọ bụ àgwà mmadụ.
igbo.knowbility_austin_tx_est_1999_runs_ope: Knowbility (Austin, TX, hiwere 1999) na-eduzi OpenAIR — accessibility hackathon kachasị ogologo ụwa — ma na-azụ ndị ọkachamara site na AccessU. Ha dere akụkụ buru ibu nke akwụkwọ ntuziaka nke onye nyocha ọ bụla nke oge a na-eji.
igbo.you_don_t_need_a_lawyer_to_file_an_ada: Ị chọghị onye ọka iwu iji tinye mkpesa ADA Title II / III. Ngalaba Ikpe (ada.gov), Section 508 (section508.gov), na ụlọ ọrụ ndị ọka iwu izugbe nke steeti niile na-anabata mkpesa ụmụ amaala — saịtị gọọmentị a na-enweghị ike ịnweta bụ iwu na-akwadoghị.
igbo.history_your_audit_trail: Akụkọ ihe mere eme — akara audit gị
igbo.past_audits_saved_here_so_you_can_trac: A na-echekwa audit gara aga ebe a ka ị nwee ike nyochaa saịtị ndị kasịrị mma (ma ọ bụ kara njọ) ka oge na-aga. Aggregate metrics na-enye gị ohere igosi ikpe enwere ike kesaa nye school IT ma ọ bụ vendor.
igbo.first_audit_5_audits_10_audits_critica: First Audit, 5 Audits, 10 Audits, Critical Issue Hunter, POUR Master, wdg. Nnabata maka ọrụ na-adịghị mma nke ijide nsogbu *tupu* ha eru ndị ọrụ nwere nkwarụ.
igbo.the_ai_will_analyze_the_website_s_acce: AI ga-enyocha accessibility nke website dabere na nhazi a maara na ụkpụrụ nkịtị.
igbo.paste_any_html_code_from_a_school_proj: Mado HTML code ọ bụla — site na ọrụ ụlọ akwụkwọ, webpage, ma ọ bụ nke coding tool mepụtara. AI ga-enyocha ya maka nsogbu accessibility.
igbo.upload_a_pdf_document_to_check_its_acc: Bulite akwụkwọ PDF iji lelee accessibility ya
igbo.the_ai_will_check_for_tagged_structure: AI ga-elele: tagged structure, usoro ọgụgụ, alt text na onyonyo, form labels, color contrast, nkwupụta asụsụ, na heading hierarchy.
igbo.upload_a_screenshot_of_a_website_app_o: Bulite screenshot nke website, ngwa, ma ọ bụ akwụkwọ
igbo.the_ai_will_visually_analyze_the_scree: AI ga-enyocha screenshot n'anya maka: nsogbu color contrast, label na-efu, nsogbu layout, ịgụ ederede, na ihe mgbochi visual accessibility.
igbo.paste_the_post_text_include_hashtags_m: Mado ederede post (tinye hashtags, nzọ aha, na nkọwa onyonyo)
igbo.paste_the_full_post_text_here_include_:
Mado ederede post zuru ezu ebe a...

Tinye:
• Ọdịnaya ederede niile
• Hashtags
• Nkọwa onyonyo (ma ọ dị)
• Link URLs
igbo.rewrite_post_accessibly: Degharịa post n'ụzọ enwere ike ịnweta
igbo.checks_alt_text_captions_camelcase_has: Na-elele: alt text, captions, CamelCase hashtags, ebe emoji, ịgụ, contrast, na ederede n'ime onyonyo.
igbo.audit_government_and_school_websites_f: Nyochaa website gọọmentị na ụlọ akwụkwọ maka nnabata ADA Title II. Gụnyere standard WCAG checks na ihe achọrọ Title II nke ọ bụla.
igbo.checks_wcag_2_1_aa_ada_coordinator_inf: Na-elele WCAG 2.1 AA + ozi ADA Coordinator, accessibility statement, usoro mkpesa, PDF tagging, form accessibility, captions, na third-party tools.
igbo.checking_structure_images_contrast_key: Na-elele nhazi, onyonyo, contrast, keyboard access, na ihe ndị ọzọ
igbo.this_score_is_generated_by_an_ai_model: Ọ bụ AI model na-emepụta score a na-eche echiche banyere ihe ọ na-ahụ — ọ bụghị automated WCAG test. Kwado ezigbo contrast ratios, keyboard order, na focus site na ngwaọrụ ndị dị ka axe, WAVE, ma ọ bụ Lighthouse.
igbo.alloflow_cannot_fetch_or_inspect_a_liv: AlloFlow enweghị ike iweta ma ọ bụ nyochaa saịtị dị ndụ — ndị a bụ ọtụtụ AI site na training data, ọ bụghị ihe achọpụtara nkwado. Ekwughị nnabata ma ọ bụ tinye mkpesa dabere na ha na-enyochaghị nke ọ bụla n'onwe gị.
igbo.core_criteria_click_any_to_learn_more: core criteria. Pịa nke ọ bụla iji mụtakwuo.
igbo.a_real_wcag_ratio_computed_in_your_bro: Ezigbo WCAG ratio nke a gbakọtara na browser gị site na relative luminance — ọ bụghị ọtụtụ AI. Họrọ agba ederede na agba background.
igbo.large_18pt_or_14pt_bold_this_is_the_ex: Buru ibu = 18pt+ (ma ọ bụ 14pt+ bold). Nke a bụ kpọmkwem ọ̀tụ̀tụ̀ axe / WAVE / Lighthouse na-eji.
igbo.press_tab_to_move_between_these_two_bu: Pịa Tab iji gaa n'etiti bọtịnụ abụọ a. Otu na-egosi ebe keyboard focus dị; nke ọzọ na-ezo ya — onye ọrụ keyboard-only ga-efu.
igbo.annual_hands_on_training_conference_hy: Ọgbakọ ọzụzụ aka-na-ọrụ kwa afọ (hybrid). Akpọrọ ya aha Dr. John Slatin, ọ na-akụzi nkà bara uru na coding, usability, na inclusive design. Nnọkọ ọzọ: May 11–14, 2026.
igbo.an_8_week_global_online_competition_pa: Asọmpi ọnlaịn zuru ụwa ọnwa 8 nke na-ejikọta ndị ọkachamara web ndị ọrụ afọ ofufo na nonprofits iji wuo website ndị enwere ike ịnweta. Ọ malitere dị ka hackathon otu ụbọchị wee bụrụ mmemme isi nke Knowbility.
igbo.volunteer_at_accessu: Rụọ ọrụ afọ ofufo na AccessU
igbo.help_with_registration_room_hosting_an: Nyere aka na ndebanye aha, ịkwado ọnụ ụlọ, na nkwado. Nweta ịnweta ọgbakọ n'efu maka shift awa 4-8.
igbo.developers_designers_and_content_creat: Developers, designers, na content creators na-ewu website ndị enwere ike ịnweta maka nonprofits.
igbo.attend_accessu_sessions_use_free_resou: Gaa nnọkọ AccessU, jiri free resources, ma wuo nkà accessibility gị.
igbo.use_this_tool_to_audit_and_report_acce: Jiri ngwaọrụ A nyochaa ma kọọ ihe mgbochi accessibility. Bụrụ onye nnọchiteanya mgbanwe na obodo gị!
igbo.visit_knowbility_volunteer_today: ♿ Gaa Knowbility — rụọ ọrụ afọ ofufo taa
igbo.found_accessibility_barriers_generate_: Hụrụ ihe mgbochi accessibility? Mepụta complaint letter nke gọọmentị iji rịọ mgbanwe. Họrọ onye nnata gị:
igbo.entity_name_school_city_agency: Aha ụlọ ọrụ (ụlọ akwụkwọ, obodo, ụlọ ọrụ)
igbo.e_g_portland_public_schools_city_of_au: d.ọ. Portland Public Schools, Obodo Austin
igbo.describe_the_impact_who_is_affected_an: Kọwaa mmetụta (onye metụtara na otú e si
igbo.e_g_my_child_uses_a_screen_reader_and_: d.ọ. Nwa m na-eji screen reader ọ pụghị ịgagharị na enrollment forms...
igbo.contact_the_entity_s_ada_coordinator_f: Buru ụzọ kpọtụrụ ADA Coordinator nke ụlọ ọrụ — ọtụtụ mgbe ha nwere ike idozi nsogbu ngwa ngwa.
igbo.if_unresolved_file_with_the_doj_at_ada: Ọ bụrụ na edozighị ya, tinye na DOJ na ada.gov/file-a-complaint/
igbo.you_can_also_mail_u_s_doj_civil_rights: Ị nwekwara ike izipu na: U.S. DOJ, Civil Rights Division, 950 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington DC 20530
igbo.no_audits_yet_run_your_first_audit_to_: Enwebeghị audit. Gbaa audit mbụ gị iji hụ nsonaazụ ebe a.

lingala.vision_audit_failed_the_file_may_be_to: Vision audit elongi te. Fichier ekoki kozala monene mingi to ezali na support te.
lingala.audit_failed_try_different_content_or_: Audit elongi te. Meka contenu mosusu to URL ya pɛtɛɛ.
lingala.audit_failed_the_content_could_not_be_: Audit elongi te. Contenu ekokaki kotalelama te.
lingala.be_an_accessibility_change_agent_audit: Zala agent ya mbongwana mpo na accessibility — sala audit, yekola, lobela
lingala.blind_low_vision: Bato bakufá miso mpe bamonaka malamu te
lingala.need_screen_readers_and_alt_text: Basengeli na screen reader mpe alt text
lingala.deaf_hard_of_hearing: Bato bakufá matoi mpe bayokaka malamu te
lingala.need_clear_language_and_structure: Basengeli na monɔkɔ mpe structure ya polele
lingala.audit_paste_it_see_what_breaks: Audit — kotisa yango, tala nini ekobukana
lingala.ai_runs_a_wcag_2_1_aa_pass_against_url: AI ezali kosala WCAG 2.1 AA pass na input URL / HTML / PDF / screenshot / social / gouvernement. Makambo oyo emonanaka mingi: alt text ezangi (1.1.1), color contrast na nse ya 4.5:1 (1.4.3), keyboard traps (2.1.1), bisika oyo ezangi label (3.3.2).
lingala.perceivable_operable_understandable_ro: Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust (POUR). Critère ya WCAG nyonso ekokani na moko ya oyo. Bokono ezali bokeseni kati na nzoto mpe environnement, ata moke te ezaleli ya moto.
lingala.knowbility_the_field_s_veterans: Knowbility — bato ya mayele ya domaine
lingala.knowbility_austin_tx_est_1999_runs_ope: Knowbility (Austin, TX, etongamaki 1999) ezali kotambolisa OpenAIR — accessibility hackathon oyo eumeli mingi koleka na mokili — mpe eteyaka ba professionnels na nzela ya AccessU. Bakomaki eteni monene ya buku ya litambwisi oyo auditor nyonso ya sika asalelaka.
lingala.you_don_t_need_a_lawyer_to_file_an_ada: Osengeli te na avoka mpo na kotia plainte ADA Title II / III. Ministère ya Justice (ada.gov), Section 508 (section508.gov), mpe ba bureaux ya procureurs généraux ya ba États bandimaka ba plaintes ya bana mboka — mpe ba sites ya gouvernement oyo ekoki kokɔtama te ezali contre la loi.
lingala.history_your_audit_trail: Historiki — nzela ya audit na yo
lingala.past_audits_saved_here_so_you_can_trac: Ba audit ya kala ebombami awa mpo okoka kolanda ba sites nini ebongaki (to ebebaki) na boumeli ya tango. Aggregate metrics epesaka yo nzela ya kolakisa likambo oyo okoki kokabola na school IT to vendor.
lingala.first_audit_5_audits_10_audits_critica: First Audit, 5 Audits, 10 Audits, Critical Issue Hunter, POUR Master, bnbn. Boyebani ya mosala ya kitoko te ya kokanga mikakatano *liboso* ekóma epai ya basaleli oyo bazali na bokono.
lingala.the_ai_will_analyze_the_website_s_acce: AI ekotala accessibility ya website na kotalela structure na yango oyo eyebani mpe ba modèles ya momesano.
lingala.paste_any_html_code_from_a_school_proj: Kotisa HTML code nyonso — uta na projet ya kelasi, webpage, to oyo coding tool esali. AI ekotala yango mpo na mikakatano ya accessibility.
lingala.upload_a_pdf_document_to_check_its_acc: Tinda document PDF mpo na kotala accessibility na yango
lingala.the_ai_will_check_for_tagged_structure: AI ekotala: tagged structure, molɔngɔ ya kotanga, alt text na bililingi, form labels, color contrast, déclaration ya monɔkɔ, mpe heading hierarchy.
lingala.upload_pdf_for_accessibility_audit: Tinda PDF mpo na accessibility audit
lingala.upload_a_screenshot_of_a_website_app_o: Tinda screenshot ya website, app, to document
lingala.the_ai_will_visually_analyze_the_scree: AI ekotala screenshot na miso mpo na: mikakatano ya color contrast, ba labels ezangi, mikakatano ya layout, kotángama ya texte, mpe ba barrières ya visual accessibility.
lingala.upload_screenshot_for_accessibility_au: Tinda screenshot mpo na accessibility audit
lingala.paste_the_post_text_include_hashtags_m: Kotisa texte ya post (bakisa hashtags, ba mentions, mpe ba description ya bililingi)
lingala.paste_the_full_post_text_here_include_:
Kotisa texte mobimba ya post awa...

Bakisa:
• Contenu nyonso ya texte
• Hashtags
• Ba description ya bililingi (soki ezali)
• Link URLs
lingala.audit_social_media_post: Sala audit ya social media post
lingala.rewrite_post_accessibly: Komaka post lisusu na lolenge oyo ekoki kokɔtama
lingala.checks_alt_text_captions_camelcase_has: Etalaka: alt text, captions, CamelCase hashtags, esika ya emoji, kotángama, contrast, mpe texte na kati ya bililingi.
lingala.audit_government_and_school_websites_f: Sala audit ya ba websites ya gouvernement mpe ya kelasi mpo na conformité ADA Title II. Ezali na standard WCAG checks mpe ba exigences spécifiques ya Title II.
lingala.checks_wcag_2_1_aa_ada_coordinator_inf: Etalaka WCAG 2.1 AA + ba sango ya ADA Coordinator, accessibility statement, ezaleli ya plainte, PDF tagging, form accessibility, captions, mpe ba third-party tools.
lingala.running_wcag_2_1_aa_accessibility_audi: Ezali kosala WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit...
lingala.checking_structure_images_contrast_key: Ezali kotala structure, bililingi, contrast, keyboard access, mpe mosusu
lingala.this_score_is_generated_by_an_ai_model: Score oyo esalemi na AI model oyo ezali kokanisa na likambo oyo ekoki komona — ezali automated WCAG test te. Ndimisa ba contrast ratios ya solo, keyboard order, mpe focus na ba outils lokola axe, WAVE, to Lighthouse.
lingala.alloflow_cannot_fetch_or_inspect_a_liv: AlloFlow akoki kozwa to kotala site ya bomoi te — oyo ezali ba estimations ya AI uta na training data, ezali ba découvertes ya kondimama te. Koloba conformité te to kotia plainte na bango te soki otali moko na moko yo moko te.
lingala.file_complaint_about_findings: Tia plainte mpo na ba découvertes
lingala.core_criteria_click_any_to_learn_more: core criteria. Finá nyonso mpo na koyeba mingi.
lingala.a_real_wcag_ratio_computed_in_your_bro: WCAG ratio ya SOLO oyo esalemi na browser na yo uta na relative luminance — ezali estimation ya AI te. Pona couleur ya texte mpe couleur ya background.
lingala.large_18pt_or_14pt_bold_this_is_the_ex: Monene = 18pt+ (to 14pt+ bold). Oyo ezali kaka calcul oyo axe / WAVE / Lighthouse esalelaka.
lingala.press_tab_to_move_between_these_two_bu: Finá Tab mpo na kotambola kati na ba boutons mibale oyo. Moko ezali kolakisa esika keyboard focus ezali; mosusu ezali kobomba yango — moto oyo asalelaka kaka keyboard akobunga.
lingala.annual_hands_on_training_conference_hy: Conférence ya formation pratique ya mbula na mbula (hybride). Epesamaki nkombo na Dr. John Slatin, eteyaka ba compétences ya pratique na coding, usability, mpe inclusive design. Session oyo elandi: May 11–14, 2026.
lingala.an_8_week_global_online_competition_pa: Concours online ya mokili mobimba ya pɔsɔ 8 oyo esangisaka ba professionnels web ya porte-volontaire na ba nonprofits mpo na kotonga ba sites oyo ekoki kokɔtama. Ebandaki lokola hackathon ya mokolo moko mpe ekómaki programme ya liboso ya Knowbility.
lingala.help_with_registration_room_hosting_an: Salisa na inscription, koyamba ba salles, mpe support. Zwa accès ya conférence ya ofele mpo na shift ya ngonga 4-8.
lingala.developers_designers_and_content_creat: Ba developers, ba designers, mpe ba content creators batongaka ba sites oyo ekoki kokɔtama mpo na ba nonprofits.
lingala.attend_accessu_sessions_use_free_resou: Yaka na ba sessions ya AccessU, salelá ba ressources ya ofele, mpe tonga ba compétences ya accessibility na yo.
lingala.use_this_tool_to_audit_and_report_acce: Salelá outil OYO mpo na kosala audit mpe kopesa rapport ya ba barrières ya accessibility. Zala agent ya mbongwana na communauté na yo!
lingala.found_accessibility_barriers_generate_: Omoni ba barrières ya accessibility? Sala complaint letter officielle mpo na kosenga mbongwana. Pona moto ya kozwa:
lingala.e_g_portland_public_schools_city_of_au: ndakisa Portland Public Schools, Engumba Austin
lingala.describe_the_impact_who_is_affected_an: Limbola effet (nani azwami mpe ndenge nini)
lingala.e_g_my_child_uses_a_screen_reader_and_: ndakisa Mwana na ngai asalelaka screen reader mpe akoki kotambola na enrollment forms te...
lingala.contact_the_entity_s_ada_coordinator_f: Kɔta nanu ADA Coordinator ya entité — mbala mingi bakoki kosilisa mikakatano nokinoki.
lingala.if_unresolved_file_with_the_doj_at_ada: Soki esili te, tia na DOJ na ada.gov/file-a-complaint/
lingala.you_can_also_mail_u_s_doj_civil_rights: Okoki mpe kotinda mokanda na: U.S. DOJ, Civil Rights Division, 950 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Washington DC 20530
lingala.no_audits_yet_run_your_first_audit_to_: Audit ezali naino te. Sala audit na yo ya liboso mpo na komona ba résultats awa.
